mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT C.COMM_NO) FROM COMMUNITY C LEFT JOIN COMMUNITY_HASHTAG CH ON C.COMM_NO = CH.CHTG_COMM_NO LEFT JOIN HASHTAG H ON CH.CHTG_HTAG_NO = H.HTAG_NO WHERE C.COMM_USE_YN = 'Y' AND ( C.COMM_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR C.COMM_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR H.HTAG_TAG_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT C.COMM_NO AS commNo, C.COMM_MBR_ID AS commMbrId, M.MBR_NICKNAME AS mbrNickname, C.COMM_CAT_CD AS commCatCd, C.COMM_MAIN_IMG_URL AS commMainImgUrl, C.COMM_TITLE AS commTitle, C.COMM_CONTENT AS commContent, C.COMM_INQIRE_CNT AS commInqireCnt, C.COMM_LIKE_CNT AS commLikeCnt, C.COMM_CMNT_CNT AS commCmntCnt, DATE_FORMAT(C.COMM_REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS commRegDate FROM COMMUNITY C JOIN MEMBER M ON C.COMM_MBR_ID = M.MBR_ID LEFT JOIN COMMUNITY_HASHTAG CH ON C.COMM_NO = CH.CHTG_COMM_NO LEFT JOIN HASHTAG H ON CH.CHTG_HTAG_NO = H.HTAG_NO WHERE C.COMM_USE_YN = 'Y' AND ( C.COMM_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR C.COMM_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR H.HTAG_TAG_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) GROUP BY C.COMM_NO ORDER BY C.COMM_NO DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
